headline: Claude Opus gets wild context, new models drop left & right

picks.name: Claude 4.6 Opus
picks.tagline: 1M context window at standard pricing, finally
picks.summary: Anthropic's flagship now handles massive documents with full GA on 1M context + 128K output. Lowkey the context king rn with agentic capabilities that actually work.

picks.name: Windsurf
picks.tagline: The first agentic IDE that actually ships
picks.summary: Fr the most complete agentic dev experience. Arena Mode lets you compare models side-by-side, Plan Mode handles smarter task planning before code gen.
picks.bestFor: developers wanting repo-wide context & multi-file refactors

picks.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
picks.summary: Google's new model doubles reasoning performance vs Gemini 3 Pro. Full video processing, 24-language voice, tiered thinking levels = massive value for cost-conscious teams.
picks.bestFor: multimodal tasks, voice work, cost-optimized inference

picks.name: Meta Vibes AI Editor
picks.tagline: Standalone creation studio for video & image gen
picks.summary: Quietly launched as a full editor now. Image & video generation, timeline editing, production tools—it's like Google Flow but tbh the output quality still needs work.
picks.bestFor: creators wanting to prototype visuals fast

watchNext.title: xAI Hires Cursor Leaders for Coding Push
watchNext.why: Musk's AI company is pulling top talent from the fastest-growing IDE. Signal that coding agent wars are heating up fr.

watchNext.title: Meta Layoffs & AI Cost Explosion
watchNext.why: Meta planning 20%+ cuts as AI infrastructure costs spiral. Reminder that even giants feel the compute crunch.
